name: IP Cow
tagline: IP lookup and network tools — running since 2005
description: Live since March 18, 2005. Cloudflare Pages/Workers/DNS. Seven active repos across app/assets/check-ipv4/check-ipv6/geo-proxy/domain-parking/prototype. Uses ipgeolocation.io, UA parser, Ookla speedtest. Zero tracking, no ads, no mandatory signup. park.ipcow.com handles domain parking.
